quote: The DDU ICT Club changed my life. I went from knowing nothing to building full-stack apps.
author: Abebe K.

quote: A place where innovation meets passion. The mentorship here is unmatched.

quote: Being part of this club has opened so many doors for my career. The networking opportunities are incredible and I've made lifelong friends.

quote: I've learned more practical skills here than in any classroom. The workshops are top-notch!
